Declares a function to push display calibration settings onto a window stack.

# Purpose
This C header file provides a forward declaration for a structure named `WindowStack` and defines a type alias for it. It also declares a function [`settings_display_calibration_push`](<#settings_display_calibration_push>), which takes a pointer to a `WindowStack` as its parameter. The function is likely intended to manage or modify the display calibration settings within a stack of windows, although the specific implementation details are not included in this file. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
